creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: 3 Fun & Free Piers You Must Visit in NYC #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Here are three fun and free piers you must visit in New York City. Starting with Pier 97 which is a two and a half acre waterfront oasis that sits along the Hudson River. You'll be able to check out the massive sports field with blue turf, walk through the beautiful cabana where you can lay back and enjoy skyline views, take a ride on the super fast adult slide with New York City in the background, and cap off your visit with a beautiful sunset. Next you'll head over to Pier 57 where you'll walk past the market until you find the elevator. Hit the button for park and you'll step out into this elevated free rooftop park with sweeping views of the Hudson River and all of New York City. Finally we have Pier 35 where you can take a ride on these giant swings while looking out over the East River and catch the sunset with views of the Manhattan Bridge and all of Lower Manhattan. Follow for more New York City tours.
